creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 238769
git diff for audio/snd

Upgrade audio/snd to version 22.9

snd-22.9/NEWS:
Snd 22.8

s7: s7_number_to_real_with_location. s7_wrong_type_error. 
    s7_make_string_wrapper_with_length. s7_make_semipermanent_string.
    CL-style doc strings, (symbol...) settable.

checked: sbcl 2.2.9

Builds and tests fine on 12 && 13.

That's it. Thanks!

--Chris
